description:
Overview:
It is colorful and beautiful, make the bathroom looks more comfortable and relaxing.
Prevent water from splashing everywhere and keep the bathroom clean.
The product is very practical with nice quality. 


Specification:
Material: Polyester
Style: Classic
Pattern: Portrait
Model Number: GW
Feature: Eco-Friendly


Package Content:
1 x shower curtain
